channel.title: Hacker News Daily
channel.description: Curated daily digest of top Hacker News stories with AI-generated summaries, tags, and bilingual translations.

item.title: Steam Machine launches today
item.dc:creator: theschwa
item.description:
Valve's Steam Machine hardware page surfaces its long-running attempt to bring PC gaming into the living room with console-like form factors. The effort illustrates the ongoing tension between performance, usability, and ecosystem control in living-room gaming hardware.

Valve 在 Steam 机器硬件页再次出现，展示其将 PC 游戏带入客厅的长期尝试，强调性能、易用性与生态系统控制之间的权衡。此举反映出游戏硬件在家庭娱乐中的定位与挑战。

▲ 1895 · 💬 1677 · Hardware · Gaming

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Running local models is good now
item.dc:creator: jfb
item.description:
Recent advances in open-source models, tooling, and consumer hardware have made running local models practical again. Local inference offers privacy, lower latency, and offline reliability, though trade-offs in performance and updatability remain.

近来开源模型、工具链和硬件水平的提升让本地运行模型重新成为现实，带来隐私、更低延迟和离线可用性等优势，同时在性能与可更新性方面仍存在权衡。

▲ 1535 · 💬 591 · AI · Open Source · Privacy · Hardware

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Midjourney Medical
item.dc:creator: ricochet11
item.description:
Midjourney extends its generative AI into medical contexts, exploring potential uses for imaging, diagnostics, and patient communication. The discussion highlights the tradeoffs between creative flexibility and the stringent safety, privacy, and accuracy requirements in healthcare.

Midjourney 将其生成式 AI 引入医疗场景，探索在影像、诊断与病人沟通中的潜在应用。讨论强调在医疗领域对安全、隐私与准确性等高要求与创意灵活性之间的权衡。

▲ 1327 · 💬 860 · AI · Health · Privacy

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Lore – Open source version control system designed for scalability
item.dc:creator: regnerba
item.description:
Lore is an open-source version control system built to scale with large codebases and teams. It emphasizes performance and architecture designed to handle millions of files, making collaboration smoother for enterprises and big projects. The takeaway: it positions itself as a scalable alternative to traditional VCS in environments where Git can struggle.

Lore 是一个为大型代码库和团队协作而设计的开源版本控制系统。它强调高性能和可扩展的架构，能够处理海量文件，从而为企业级大项目提供更顺畅的协作。核心在于它试图在 Git 可能吃力的环境中提供一个可扩展的替代方案。

▲ 1238 · 💬 670 · Open Source · Programming

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Deno Desktop
item.dc:creator: GeneralMaximus
item.description:
Deno Desktop introduces a cross-platform desktop runtime for building apps with TypeScript and JavaScript using the Deno toolchain. The docs outline how to create, package, and run desktop apps with Deno, bridging web UI tech with native OS capabilities.

Deno Desktop 引入一个跨平台桌面运行时，方便用 TypeScript/JavaScript 基于 Deno 构建桌面应用。文档介绍了创建、打包与运行桌面应用的方式，以及与原生操作系统能力的对接。

▲ 1083 · 💬 388 · Programming · Open Source

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: GrapheneOS has been ported to Android 17
item.dc:creator: Cider9986
item.description:
GrapheneOS has reached a port to Android 17, bringing its hardened, privacy-first Android fork to the latest base. Expect updated security hardening, better device compatibility, and official builds rolling out soon. This signals ongoing momentum for privacy-focused Android variants as core Android updates proceed.

GrapheneOS 已实现对 Android 17 的移植，延续其以隐私和安全为核心的 Android 派生系统。官方版本预计不久就会发布，带来更新的安全增强和更广的设备兼容性，标志着隐私取向的 Android 生态持续增长。

▲ 990 · 💬 580 · Security · Open Source · Privacy

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: I found 10k GitHub repositories distributing Trojan malware
item.dc:creator: theorchid
item.description:
A collection of about 10,000 GitHub repositories distributing Trojan malware highlights the scale of malware hosted on code platforms. It underscores the importance of supply-chain security and rigorous review of dependencies when building software.

大约一万多个 GitHub 仓库被发现用于传播木马恶意软件，揭示代码托管平台上恶意分发的规模。这凸显了在构建软件时加强供应链安全和依赖审查的重要性。

▲ 951 · 💬 243 · Security · Open Source · Programming

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Hyundai buys Boston Dynamics
item.dc:creator: ck2
item.description:
Hyundai has completed securing full control of Boston Dynamics, with SoftBank exiting the stake for about $325 million. This move bets big on Hyundai’s robotics ambitions, signaling a push to integrate robot hardware, AI, and mobility platforms across its business units. Boston Dynamics gains a more stable automotive-aligned parent with resources to scale.

现代集团完成对 Boston Dynamics 的全面控股，软银退出，交易额约3.25亿美元。这笔交易巩固了现代在机器人领域的长期野心，便于在其业务线里整合机器人硬件、人工智能与智能出行生态。

▲ 945 · 💬 394 · Business · Startups · AI · Hardware

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: What we call "age verification" is actually mass surveillance
item.dc:creator: hn_acker
item.description:
Age verification systems end up acting as mass surveillance, aggregating data across sites and enabling detailed behavior profiling. The piece argues these schemes are inherently invasive and proposes alternative privacy-preserving approaches or abolishing them.

年龄验证系统被视为大规模监控，跨站点收集数据以核验年龄，具有隐私风险。文章主张摒弃或重设计这类系统，倡导更隐私友好的替代方案。

▲ 874 · 💬 487 · Privacy · Data

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: We’re making Bunny DNS free
item.dc:creator: dabinat
item.description:
Bunny DNS announces it will make its domain name system service free, lowering the barrier for personal sites and startups to adopt fast, resilient DNS. The move could pressure competitors to offer similar free tiers and raises questions about sustainability and future monetization.

Bunny DNS 将其域名解析服务免费化，降低个人站点和初创企业采用高效 DNS 的门槛。此举可能对竞争对手施压，促使行业普遍提供免费层，但也引发对未来盈利模式与可持续性的担忧。

▲ 873 · 💬 258 · Business · Web

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: GLM-5.2 is the new leading open weights model on Artificial Analysis
item.dc:creator: himata4113
item.description:
GLM-5.2 has emerged as the leading open-weight model on the Artificial Analysis index, outperforming its predecessors in benchmark tests. It demonstrates strong generalization with competitive inference speed, illustrating how open-weight ecosystems continue to close the gap with closed models. This trend lowers barriers for researchers to experiment with powerful LLMs at scale.

GLM-5.2 已成为开源权重模型的领先者，领先于前代模型并在基准测试中表现突出。它在推理速度和泛化能力方面表现有竞争力，标志着开源权重生态的成熟。此趋势降低了研究人员在大模型实验中的门槛。

▲ 856 · 💬 415 · AI · Open Source

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Identity verification on Claude
item.dc:creator: bathory
item.description:
Claude includes an identity verification flow to control access for sensitive features and enterprise usage. The guide covers when verification is required, what methods are supported, and how it affects access privileges.

Claude 提供身份验证流程以控制对敏感功能和企业用途的访问。指南说明何时需要验证、支持哪些方法，以及对权限访问的影响。

▲ 835 · 💬 691 · Security · AI

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Did my old job only exist because of fraud?
item.dc:creator: advisedwang
item.description:
Questioning whether some roles exist due to misaligned incentives or fraud, the piece explores the fragility of certain job markets and the potential for automation. It advocates for transparency, better verification, and data-driven evaluation of roles rather than anecdotal narratives.

质疑某些岗位是否因激励错位或欺诈而存在，探讨了部分职业市场的脆弱性与自动化的潜在影响。倡导提高透明度、强化核验，并以数据驱动来评估岗位，而非仅凭主观叙述。

▲ 822 · 💬 417 · Career

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: U.S. science is in chaos
item.dc:creator: presspot
item.description:
An analysis arguing the U.S. science-politics compact is broken, threatening long-term funding, independent oversight, and scientific consensus.

一篇分析指出，美国科学与政治之间的默契已破裂，长期资助、独立监督和科学共识受到威胁。文章强调政治极化和短期政策周期削弱了研究生态系统，也影响着科技创新的发展。

▲ 815 · 💬 980 · Science · Politics

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Pledging another $400k to the Zig software foundation
item.dc:creator: tosh
item.description:
Zig's ecosystem keeps growing as a further $400k is pledged to its software foundation. The donation signals continued community support and could accelerate language tooling, compiler work, and ecosystem initiatives that push Zig toward broader adoption and stability.

Zig 生态系统再次获得资金支持，向其软件基金会再捐出40万美元，显示社区的持续支持。捐款有望推动语言工具链、编译器改进和生态项目，加速 Zig 的普及与稳定性提升。

▲ 803 · 💬 288 · Programming

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Norway imposes near ban on AI in elementary school
item.dc:creator: ilreb
item.description:
Norway is moving toward a near-ban on AI use in elementary schools, tightening rules on what students and teachers can access on school devices. The policy underscores safety concerns and data privacy while grappling with how to responsibly integrate AI into early education.

挪威正推动对小学生在校使用AI的几近全面禁令，严格限制师生在校设备上的AI工具使用。此举凸显对安全与数据隐私的关注，以及在早教阶段如何负责任地引入AI的权衡。

▲ 801 · 💬 575 · Politics · Education · AI · Privacy

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Swiss parliament lifts ban on new nuclear power plants
item.dc:creator: leonidasrup
item.description:
Switzerland's parliament voted to lift the ban on new nuclear power plants, signaling a pivot in the country's energy strategy. The move could affect climate goals, energy security, and the pace of nuclear innovation in Europe.

瑞士议会投票解除对新核电厂的禁令，标志着能源战略的转折。此举可能影响碳目标、能源安全以及欧洲在核能创新上的推进速度。

▲ 799 · 💬 944 · Energy · Politics · Security

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Volkswagen started blocking GrapheneOS users
item.dc:creator: microtonal
item.description:
Volkswagen has started blocking GrapheneOS users from its apps. The move highlights ongoing frictions between privacy-focused mobile OS choices and corporate app ecosystems, raising questions about platform-level access and user rights. It underscores how vendor policies can limit privacy-aware users and the ecosystems around open-source mobile OSes.

大众汽车开始屏蔽 GrapheneOS 用户使用其应用的行为凸显了隐私导向的移动系统与厂商应用生态之间的矛盾。此举引发对平台访问和用户权益的讨论，也提醒隐私友好型操作系统的使用者可能面临被排除的风险。厂商政策对开源移动生态的影响再次成为焦点。

▲ 775 · 💬 462 · Privacy · Open Source

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Never Give Them Your Face
item.dc:creator: audiodude
item.description:
Biometric privacy takes center stage as the piece argues you should not hand over facial data to services. It explains the risks of irreversible exposure and outlines practical steps to minimize biometric leakage and design identity systems with privacy in mind.

这篇文章聚焦生物识别隐私，主张避免向服务提供脸部数据，因为一旦暴露难以撤回。文中给出实际步骤以降低面部识别数据的泄露风险，并探讨在身份设计中应考虑的隐私治理要点。

▲ 741 · 💬 439 · Privacy

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Microsoft new Outlook takes 10 seconds to do what Outlook Classic does instantly
item.dc:creator: Adam-Hincu
item.description:
The new Outlook design takes about ten seconds to complete tasks that the classic app did instantly, highlighting a productivity hit from modernization. This reflects a broader tension between feature-rich updates and user experience in enterprise software, fueling calls for an option to revert to a familiar workflow.

新版 Outlook 在完成一些经典版能瞬间完成的任务时需约十秒，暴露出现代化改造带来的生产力损失。这反映了企业软件在功能增强与用户体验之间的博弈，也推动了对保留熟悉工作流的需求。

▲ 696 · 💬 490 · Design

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: FUTO Swipe – A new swipe typing model
item.dc:creator: futohq
item.description:
FUTO Swipe introduces a new swipe-typing model designed to improve accuracy and speed on mobile keyboards. The model promises smarter prediction and resilience across layouts, with a public demo at the project site.

FUTO Swipe 推出全新的滑动输入模型，旨在提升移动端键盘的准确性与输入速度。该模型声称在不同布局下都具备更智能的预测能力，公开演示在项目站点可见。

▲ 649 · 💬 229 · AI

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: F3
item.dc:creator: tosh
item.description:
F3 introduces a new forward-looking file format designed for simplicity and future-proofing. It emphasizes extensibility and interoperability, aiming to reduce data fragmentation across tools and ecosystems.

F3 将推出一种面向未来的新型文件格式，强调简单、可扩展和向后兼容性，旨在提高数据交换的鲁棒性。该项目体现了对自描述数据格式和跨工具互操作性的重视。

▲ 642 · 💬 131 · Programming · Data

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: OpenAI unveils its first custom chip, built by Broadcom
item.dc:creator: jamdesk
item.description:
OpenAI has unveiled its first custom silicon, built in partnership with Broadcom. The move signals a shift toward owning more of the hardware stack to optimize model serving and efficiency, potentially reducing reliance on Nvidia GPUs. If successful, it could reshape cloud economics and push competitors to accelerate in-house hardware efforts.

OpenAI 公布了首款定制芯片，与 Broadcom 合作打造，旨在优化自家模型的推理与训练性能。此举标志对硬件环节更深度掌控，可能降低对外部供应商的依赖，并影响云端成本与定价竞争。

▲ 640 · 💬 363 · AI · Hardware

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Fired by Google for creating the Google workspace CLI
item.dc:creator: justinwp
item.description:
A former Google employee reports being fired for building the Google Workspace CLI, raising questions about internal policies toward external tooling and open-source contributions.

据称一名前 Google 员工因开发 Google Workspace CLI 而被解雇，引发关于内部政策对外部工具和开源贡献态度的讨论。

▲ 635 · 💬 376 · Programming · Open Source · Career

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Want your images back? That'll be $5
item.dc:creator: lutr
item.description:
A service charging a flat fee to retrieve your images highlights the economics of data recovery and ownership in an AI-enabled world. It spotlights the friction and costs users face when reclaiming their own media.

关于用固定费用（5 美元）来让用户找回自己的图片，折射出数据所有权、隐私与数据恢复成本在 AI 时代的经济性与伦理议题。

▲ 634 · 💬 263 · Data · Business · AI

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Project Valhalla, Explained: How a Decade of Work Arrives in JDK 28
item.dc:creator: philonoist
item.description:
Project Valhalla brings value types and specialized generics to the JVM, enabling compact, allocation-free data representations and faster APIs. This explainer frames the decade-long effort, the tradeoffs involved, and what JDK 28 users can expect in terms of performance, memory efficiency, and backward compatibility.

Valhalla 将为 JVM 引入值类型与专用泛型，带来更紧凑、无分配的数据表示和更快的 API。本文梳理了十余年的实现过程、设计取舍，以及 JDK 28 用户在性能、内存效率和向后兼容性方面将看到的变化。

▲ 631 · 💬 390 · Programming

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Flock-Powered Police Chiefs Stalking Women Shows Why Warrants Are Needed
item.dc:creator: jhonovich
item.description:
A report shows police using a private surveillance network to track a woman, underscoring the risks of warrantless, opaque data sharing. It reinforces why warrants, oversight, and clear data governance are essential when relying on third-party camera networks.

报道揭示警察依赖私人监控网络追踪一名女性，凸显在使用第三方摄像网络时，缺乏授权与透明度的监控带来的风险。强调在此类数据资源下，必须有搜令、监督与明确的数据治理。

▲ 624 · 💬 344 · Privacy · Politics

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: GLM-5.2 – How to Run Locally
item.dc:creator: TechTechTech
item.description:
Offers practical steps to run the GLM-5.2 model locally, enabling offline inference without relying on cloud services. Running locally improves privacy and latency and gives developers more control, but it also demands hardware and setup considerations.

提供将 GLM-5.2 本地化运行的实用步骤，使离线推理不再依赖云端。 本地运行提升隐私与延迟控制，但需要合适的硬件和安装配置。

▲ 596 · 💬 293 · AI · Privacy · Hardware

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Canada plans 'nuclear renaissance' with up to 10 reactors built by 2040
item.dc:creator: geox
item.description:
Canada outlines a nuclear renaissance with up to 10 reactors by 2040, signaling a larger low-carbon electricity mix. The plan emphasizes energy security and emissions goals while acknowledging regulatory, cost, and public-acceptance hurdles.

加拿大提出到2040年建设多达10座核反应堆的核能复兴计划，意在扩大低碳电力结构。该方案强调能源安全与减排目标，同时面临监管、成本与公众接受度的挑战。

▲ 586 · 💬 458 · Energy · Politics · Security

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Jerry's Map
item.dc:creator: turtleyacht
item.description:
Jerry's Map appears to be an interactive map project that visualizes geospatial data.

Jerry's Map 看起来是一个用于可视化地理数据的交互式地图项目。

▲ 555 · 💬 60 · Data

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Help I accidentally a wigglegram
item.dc:creator: gregsadetsky
item.description:
An amusing mishap shows how wigglegrams—animated sequences stitched from multiple frames—are created and how easily one can post an unintended motion. The piece breaks down the quirks of producing these effects and offers tips for fixes or avoiding accidental wiggles.

一个有趣的失误揭示了 wigglegram（由多帧拼接成的动画）是如何生成的，以及如何无意中发布带有动效的图片。文中解析了这类效果的制作要点，并给出修正或避免意外动效的建议。

▲ 553 · 💬 126 · Entertainment · Design

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: In memory of the man who put red and green squiggles under words
item.dc:creator: saikatsg
item.description:
A memorial piece recalls the engineer who introduced red and green squiggles under words in text editors, highlighting how tiny UX cues shaped modern editing and software behavior.

追忆在文本编辑器中首次引入“红色/绿色下划线”提示的工程师，文章强调这类细微的用户体验信号对现代文本编辑和软件行为的深远影响。

▲ 549 · 💬 96 · Design

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: GPT-5.5 hallucinates 3x more than MIT-licensed GLM-5.2
item.dc:creator: oshrimpton
item.description:
A practical comparison shows GPT-5.5 hallucinates far more than GLM-5.2, raising reliability concerns for next-gen models.

评测显示，在相同条件下，GPT-5.5 的幻觉率比 MIT 许可的 GLM-5.2 高出约三倍，这让人担忧大模型的可靠性。文中讨论可能的原因，以及这对依赖对话型助手的开发者意味着什么。

▲ 548 · 💬 280 · AI

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: .gitignore Isn't the only way to ignore files in Git
item.dc:creator: FergusArgyll
item.description:
There are tactics to ignore files in Git beyond .gitignore, including skip-worktree and assume-unchanged, plus index-level tricks.

.gitignore 之外还有忽略文件的办法，如 skip-worktree、assume-unchanged 等。文中介绍了何时使用以及可能的风险。

▲ 541 · 💬 161 · Programming

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Google workspace threatening to block Firefox access
item.dc:creator: birdculture
item.description:
If true, Google Workspace blocking Firefox would raise questions about browser compatibility and vendor lock-in in enterprise tools. It would push users toward Chromium-based ecosystems and complicate privacy-focused setups. The broader signal is about how much control platforms exert over client access.

若属实，Google Workspace 可能阻断 Firefox 访问，将引发对企业工具中的浏览器兼容性与厂商锁定的讨论。这会推动用户转向以 Chromium 为核心的生态，并影响偏好隐私的工作环境。

▲ 536 · 💬 178 · Web · Privacy · Business

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Prefer duplication over the wrong abstraction (2016)
item.dc:creator: rafaepta
item.description:
Duplicating code can keep intent clear when an abstraction would misfit. Premature, poorly fitting abstractions hurt maintainability; the post argues that clarity beats clever architecture and that refactoring can come later when the need is real.

在抽象不合适时，重复实现能保持意图清晰。过早的、与场景不符的抽象会降低可维护性；文章主张清晰胜过花哨的架构，真正需要时再进行重构。

▲ 533 · 💬 345 · Programming · Design

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: There are no instances in ATProto
item.dc:creator: danabramov
item.description:
ATProto’s architecture is often misunderstood as having 'instances'. The author argues there are no such isolated 'instances' in ATProto because federation uses accounts and servers differently, emphasizing interoperability and same-identity across servers. This reframes how developers should think about hosting and moderation in ATProto.

ATProto 的架构常被误解为‘实例’概念。作者指出在 ATProto 的联邦模型里并不存在真正的‘实例’，强调跨服务器的互操作性和统一身份的重要性，这对开发者在托管与 moderation 上的思路有显著影响。

▲ 530 · 💬 304 · Programming

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Apertus – Open Foundation Model for Sovereign AI
item.dc:creator: T-A
item.description:
Apertus unveils an open foundation model designed for sovereign AI deployment with data sovereignty baked in. It supports open weights and configurable safety controls to reduce dependence on centralized providers, enabling in-country hosting and governance. This matters for governments and organizations seeking transparency and autonomy in AI.

Apertus 发布一个开放的基础模型，支持主权 AI 的部署与数据自主管控。提供开源权重和可配置的安全策略，旨在降低对大型厂商的依赖，使其能在本地或受监管环境中运行。此举对政府与重视数据主权与透明度的机构尤为重要。

▲ 526 · 💬 181 · AI · Open Source

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: CSSQuake
item.dc:creator: msalsas
item.description:
CSSQuake is a browser-based project that demonstrates CSS-driven visuals in a quake-inspired demo. It showcases how far CSS alone can push interactive, game-like experiences without heavy JavaScript.

CSSQuake 是一个在浏览器中展示 CSS 驱动视觉效果的 quake 风格演示。它展示了仅用 CSS 就能实现接近游戏体验的交互能力。

▲ 517 · 💬 110 · Web · Design · Programming

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Founding a company in Germany: €9600, 152 days and I still can't send an invoice
item.dc:creator: earcar
item.description:
The post recounts the experience of starting a company in Germany, highlighting costs and bureaucracy: €9,600 and 152 days, yet still unable to issue invoices due to local constraints. The ordeal underscores startup friction in EU jurisdictions.

博主讲述在德国创办公司的经历，成本高、手续繁琐（约9600欧元、152天），甚至无法开具正式发票，暴露出初创阶段的制度瓶颈。此类经验凸显在德经商和创业环境中的现实挑战。

▲ 515 · 💬 618 · Business · Startups

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: There are a few things that I look back on as my mistakes in the early days
item.dc:creator: shadowtree
item.description:
John Carmack looks back on a handful of early-career mistakes and distills practical lessons for builders. He emphasizes shipping over perfection, staying disciplined, and learning from feedback to move faster. The reflections offer candid, actionable guidance for ambitious developers.

Carmack 回顾早期的几次错误，并总结给开发者的可执行教训：要先落地、避免因追求完美而拖延，并从反馈中快速迭代。这样的分享为野心勃勃的开发者提供了朴实且实用的指导。

▲ 514 · 💬 257 · Programming · Career

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Court Records Should Be Free
item.dc:creator: hn_acker
item.description:
EFF argues that court records should be freely accessible and machine-readable to improve transparency, research, and accountability. The movement pushes for open court data standards and reduces friction for journalists, researchers, and the public.

EFF 呼吁法院记录应免费向公众开放并可机器可读，以提升透明度、研究和问责。倡导建立公开的法院数据标准，降低记者、研究者和公众的使用成本。

▲ 513 · 💬 137 · Legal · Data

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: GLM 5.2 vs. Opus
item.dc:creator: ritzaco
item.description:
A comparative assessment of GLM 5.2 against Opus highlights trade-offs in accuracy, decoding, efficiency, and deployment. It helps developers pick the right model for on-device or API-backed use cases. The comparison underscores how deployment context drives model choice.

对 GLM 5.2 与 Opus 的对比，聚焦在准确性、解码、效率与部署场景上的权衡，帮助开发者在本地部署与云端 API 之间做出选择。比较凸显了部署场景对模型选择的重要性。

▲ 509 · 💬 332 · AI

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Loupe – A iOS app that raises awareness about what native apps can see
item.dc:creator: Cider9986
item.description:
Loupe is an iOS app that visually demonstrates what native apps can access on-device, helping users understand app permissions and data exposure. The project underscores the importance of privacy transparency in mobile ecosystems.

Loupe 是一款用来直观展示原生应用能访问哪些数据的 iOS 应用，帮助用户理解应用权限与数据暴露。该项目凸显了移动生态系统中隐私透明度的重要性。

▲ 505 · 💬 214 · Privacy

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Codex logging bug may write TBs to local SSDs
item.dc:creator: vantareed
item.description:
An issue in Codex's logging subsystem can cause terabytes of data to be written to local SSDs, risking disk exhaustion on developer machines. This highlights the fragility of client-side logging in AI-assisted tooling and the need for safer defaults and rate-limiting. The incident underscores the importance of robust storage safeguards when using code-generation copilots locally.

Codex 的日志记录子系统存在漏洞，可能把 TB 级数据写入本地 SSD，风险是磁盘空间耗尽。此事暴露了在 AI 辅助工具中进行本地日志记录的脆弱性，需更安全的默认设置和速率限制。强调在使用代码生成助手进行本地开发时加强存储保护的重要性。

▲ 490 · 💬 267 · Programming · AI

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Beyond All Reason (Free Total Annihilation Inspired RTS)
item.dc:creator: mosiuerbarso
item.description:
Beyond All Reason is a free, community-driven RTS inspired by Total Annihilation, offering large-scale battles and classic resource economics. Built with modern, mod-friendly architecture, it emphasizes open development and cross-platform play, sustaining retro RTS enthusiasm.

Beyond All Reason 是一款免费、由社区驱动的实时策略游戏，受《Total Annihilation》启发，提供大规模战斗与经典资源系统。它采用现代化、便于修改的架构，强调开源开发与跨平台对战，延续对经典 RTS 的热爱。

▲ 490 · 💬 297 · Gaming · Open Source

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: How many of the 170k English words do you know?
item.dc:creator: abnry
item.description:
A playful tool invites you to estimate how many English words you know from a list of about 170k, highlighting vocabulary size and variation among readers. It illustrates why fluency relies on context and frequency as much as memorization.

一款有趣的工具让你在约17万单词的清单中估算自己的词汇量，揭示不同读者之间的差异。它说明了流利程度更多依赖上下文与词频，而非记住所有单词。

▲ 487 · 💬 548 · Education · Data

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Israel targeted Gaza children resulting in genocide, UN inquiry says
item.dc:creator: supercopter
item.description:
A UN inquiry concluded that Israeli actions in Gaza targeted children and amounted to genocide, prompting debates over accountability and international law. The report underscores calls for independent investigations and civilian protections in conflict zones.

联合国调查称以色列在加沙地区针对儿童的行动构成种族灭绝，引发关于问责与国际法的广泛讨论。该报告强化了推动独立调查与在冲突地区保护平民的呼声。

▲ 484 · 💬 236 · Politics · Legal

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: DeepSeek Introduces Vision
item.dc:creator: RIshabh235
item.description:
DeepSeek releases Vision, a new computer-vision platform meant to simplify building AI-powered visual apps. It emphasizes developer-friendly APIs and real-time performance across edge and cloud deployments. The launch could influence how teams prototype and deploy CV workloads.

DeepSeek 发布 Vision，这是一款旨在简化构建AI驱动视觉应用的新型计算机视觉平台。它强调面向开发者友好的 API 和在边缘及云端的实时性能。此次发布可能影响团队在原型设计与CV工作负载部署上的方式。

▲ 480 · 💬 197 · AI

HN Discussion · View on Hacker News Daily

item.title: Unlimited OCR: One-shot long-horizon parsing
item.dc:creator: ingve
item.description:
Unlimited OCR introduces one-shot long-horizon parsing for documents, enabling robust recognition and parsing over long content in a single pass. This advancement improves efficiency for enterprise document processing and hints at broader capabilities for scalable OCR in long-form workflows.

Unlimited OCR 提出一次性对长篇文档进行解析的能力，提升单次完成对长文本的识别与解析的鲁棒性与效率。该进展有望显著优化企业级文档处理，并推动长文档工作流中的 OCR 能力扩展。

▲ 478 · 💬 108 · AI
